'''âz-v-m''' ('''kazavam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cockfish|cockfish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cockfish|cockfish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-v-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazavam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizavam|thizavam]] || [[word:jizavam|jizavam]] || [[word:shizavam|shizavam]] || [[word:kizavam|kizavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzavam|thuthuzavam]] || [[word:jujuzavam|jujuzavam]] || [[word:shushuzavam|shushuzavam]] || [[word:kukuzavam|kukuzavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzavam|thuzavam]] || [[word:juzavam|juzavam]] || [[word:shuzavam|shuzavam]] || [[word:kuzavam|kuzavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzavam|thuzavam]] || [[word:juzavam|juzavam]] || [[word:shuzavam|shuzavam]] || [[word:kuzavam|kuzavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezavam|thezavam]] || [[word:jezavam|jezavam]] || [[word:shezavam|shezavam]] || [[word:kezavam|kezavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozavam|thothozavam]] || [[word:jojozavam|jojozavam]] || [[word:shoshozavam|shoshozavam]] || [[word:kokozavam|kokozavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozavam|thozavam]] || [[word:jozavam|jozavam]] || [[word:shozavam|shozavam]] || [[word:kozavam|kozavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozavam|thozavam]] || [[word:jozavam|jozavam]] || [[word:shozavam|shozavam]] || [[word:kozavam|kozavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzavam|thĂŠzavam]] || [[word:jĂŠzavam|jĂŠzavam]] || [[word:shĂŠzavam|shĂŠzavam]] || [[word:kĂŠzavam|kĂŠzavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazavam|thathazavam]] || [[word:jajazavam|jajazavam]] || [[word:shashazavam|shashazavam]] || [[word:kakazavam|kakazavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazavam|thazavam]] || [[word:jazavam|jazavam]] || [[word:shazavam|shazavam]] || [[word:kazavam|kazavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazavam|thazavam]] || [[word:jazavam|jazavam]] || [[word:shazavam|shazavam]] || [[word:kazavam|kazavam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazavam|shazavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazavam|goshazavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazavam|gokishazavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazavamnĂŒ|shazavamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazavamnknĂŒ|goshazavamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavamnĂŒ|gokishazavamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazavamshĂ«|shazavamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazavamnkshĂ«|goshazavamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazavamshĂ«|gokishazavamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavamro|shazavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavamnkro|goshazavamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavamro|gokishazavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavamu|shazavamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavamnkmu|goshazavamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavamu|gokishazavamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazavamsher|shazavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazavamnksher|goshazavamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazavamsher|gokishazavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazavamng|shazavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazavamnkng|goshazavamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazavamng|gokishazavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazavamya|shazavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazavamnkya|goshazavamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazavamya|gokishazavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazavamyam|shazavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazavamnkyam|goshazavamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazavamyam|gokishazavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavamnĂŒshĂ«|shazavamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazavamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazavamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavamnĂŒro|shazavamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavamnknĂŒro|goshazavamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavamnĂŒro|gokishazavamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavamnĂŒmu|shazavamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavamnknĂŒmu|goshazavamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavamnĂŒmu|gokishazavamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavamshĂ«nĂŒ|shazavamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazavamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazavamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavamshĂ«ro|shazavamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavamnkshĂ«ro|goshazavamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavamshĂ«ro|gokishazavamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavamshĂ«mu|shazavamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavamnkshĂ«mu|goshazavamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavamshĂ«mu|gokishazavamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavamronĂŒ|shazavamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavamnkronĂŒ|goshazavamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavamronĂŒ|gokishazavamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavamroshĂ«|shazavamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavamnkroshĂ«|goshazavamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavamroshĂ«|gokishazavamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavamromu|shazavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavamnkromu|goshazavamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavamromu|gokishazavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavamunĂŒ|shazavamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavamnkmunĂŒ|goshazavamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavamunĂŒ|gokishazavamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavamushĂ«|shazavamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavamnkmushĂ«|goshazavamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavamushĂ«|gokishazavamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavamuro|shazavamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavamnkmuro|goshazavamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavamuro|gokishazavamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
